chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1147 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 2. For hearing of CMA No.4773/2023 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 18.04.2024 Mr. Muhammad Habib Khan, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Imran Khan, Advocate for Pakistan Railways. Mr. Ashfaque Hussain Abro, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- This petition is dismissed with consent as learned Counsel for petitioner, after arguing at some length, does not press the same, and submits that he may be given three months’ time to vacate the quarter, which the other party has agreed. Accordingly, this petition is dismissed as not pressed along with listed application, in above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
